title: Permissions for guests | Create boards & other actions
excerpt:

posts.author: cmohrmann (Christine Mohrmann)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello. We have a client who absolutely loving being a guest on our monday.com account and is quite eager to do more on the shareable boards.

I see that permissions are limited, however is there a workaround or way that the guest could create boards and be open to more features?

Thanks.

Chris

posts.author: Leandre_R (Léandre @LaBriqueJaune)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @cmohrmann,

A guest account can only view the boards associated with it. To modify board informations, one must be a user. This results in occupying one seat from your Monday.com account.

Best regards,

Léandre
